name: Approval request
description: Human-in-the-loop approval request from an automated agent: key-value action details, side-by-side Approve and Reject buttons with fallback links, and an expiry line. Carries the mandatory automated-sender disclosure.
subject: Approval needed: {{action_summary}}

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: Sender company or product name; rendered as the header wordmark and in the footer.

variables.name: support_email
variables.description: Support contact email address shown in the footer.

variables.name: company_address
variables.description: Physical mailing address for the footer (CAN-SPAM).

variables.name: preheader
variables.description: Hidden inbox preview text shown next to the subject line.
variables.example: An agent action is waiting for your decision.

variables.name: agent_name
variables.description: Name of the agent requesting approval.

variables.name: action_summary
variables.description: One-line, numbers-first summary of the action awaiting approval; doubles as the heading.

variables.name: details_html
variables.description: Raw pre-rendered key-value rows for the details table: one <tr> per field with exactly two inline-styled <td> cells — field label left-aligned in the secondary color, value right-aligned. Rows only; the template owns the parent table.
variables.example: Amount$1,310.00Recipients42

variables.name: details_text
variables.description: Plain-text key-value details for the text part, one field per line, hard-wrapped to 70 characters.

variables.name: expires_at
variables.description: Human-readable time at which the request expires and the action will not proceed.
